title: ‘A pope who uses his brain’: Vatican locals and visitors take sides in Leo v Trump spat
description: While some US visitors back their president, shopkeepers who serve the papacy and tourists support the pontiff
content: On the wall of the back room of an optician’s in Borgo Pio, a neighbourhood in Rome that borders the Vatican, hang the photos of five popes dating back to the late 1970s, charting both the recent history of Catholic church leaders and the shop itself... [4400 chars]

title: Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993
description: The Iran-backed Hezbollah militia said it would not abide by any agreements of the meeting in Washington.
content:
Lebanon and Israel have held their first direct diplomatic talks in over three decades, a rare encounter aimed at ending fighting between Israel and the Iran-backed Hezbollah group.
No immediate outcome was expected from the discussion, which US Secr... [3501 chars]

title: First look at new Cambridge station entrance
description: East-West Rail says the new entrance at Cambridge railway station could be open by the mid-2030s.
content:
A new entrance at Cambridge railway station could be open by the mid-2030s, according to a rail company.
East West Rail (EWR), which is planning a new rail line connecting Oxford and Cambridge, said the new entrance, on the other side of the tracks, ... [598 chars]

title: Number of asylum hotels falls to 185 after 11 close
description: The government says the fall is partly due to housing people in alternative sites such as military barracks.
content:
Eleven hotels will no longer be used to house asylum seekers, bringing the total number down to 185 from a peak of around 400.
Home Office Minister Alex Norris said the fall was due to increased removals of people with no right to stay in the UK and ... [4088 chars]

title: Meghan’s Australia ‘tour’ has heels, arms, and a matching Harry
description: Meghan and Harry have begun their not-a-royal-tour of Australia with a lesson in his and hers dressing
content: What to pack when you are going on a pseudo royal tour? Not a question that the likes of you and me are ever going to face. Yet this week in Australia the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are generously testing the matter on our behalf. I know. The couple’... [4394 chars]
